name: cc-nexs-minimal
description: Minimal cc-nexs Codex Plugin: mirrors the lightweight planner / developer / reviewer SOP with the same command and document semantics as the Claude Code preset.

interface.shortDescription: Run the minimal cc-nexs SOP in Codex
interface.longDescription: cc-nexs minimal provides the generic three-role SOP preset for Codex. It mirrors command behavior, document write locations, role isolation, and state-machine progression from the Claude Code preset.
